tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Andrés Iniesta is one of the greatest midfielders in football history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He scored the winning goal in the 2010 FIFA World Cup final.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Iniesta was a key part of Barcelona's golden era.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Xavi was the heart of Spain's tiki taka style of football.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 2010 FIFA World Cup and two UEFA European Championships.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Xavi later became the manager of FC Barcelona.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Sergio Ramos is one of the greatest defenders in football history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the 2010 FIFA World Cup and multiple Champions League titles.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Ramos scored many important goals despite being a defender.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Iker Casillas was one of the best goalkeepers of his generation.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He captained Spain to victory in the 2010 FIFA World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Casillas spent most of his career at Real Madrid.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: David Villa is Spain's all time top scorer.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He played a key role in Spain winning the 2010 FIFA World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Villa scored crucial goals in the 2010 World Cup knockout stage.
